turns.text: How many different cars on this list were produced in 1974?

turns.predict: SELECT Id FROM cars_data WHERE Year = 1974 AND Cylinders = 8

turns.text: How many courses in this table? | Do you mean the number of the courses with different course ids? | Yes.

turns.query: SELECT  count ( distinct course_id )  from courses

turns.text: What's the name of the course with least number of students of enrollments?

turns.query: SELECT  T1.course_name FROM Courses AS T1 JOIN Student_Enrolment_Courses AS T2 ON T1.course_id   =   T2.course_id GROUP BY T1.course_name ORDER BY count ( * )  LIMIT 1
turns.predict: SELECT T1.course_name FROM Courses AS T1 JOIN Student_Enrolment_Courses AS T2 ON T1.course_id = T2.course_id GROUP BY T1.course_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC LIMIT 1

turns.text: How many dog breeds are there?

turns.query: SELECT count ( * )  from Breeds
turns.predict: SELECT count(*) FROM Breeds

turns.text: What is the biggest of those dog breeds?

turns.query: SELECT T1.breed_name FROM Breeds AS T1 JOIN Dogs AS T2 ON T1.breed_code   =   T2.breed_code GROUP BY T1.breed_name ORDER BY count ( * )  DESC LIMIT 1
turns.predict: SELECT T1.breed_name FROM Breeds AS T1 JOIN Dogs AS T2 ON T1.breed_code = T2.breed_code ORDER BY T2.weight DESC LIMIT 1

turns.text: How big is the bulldog?

turns.query: SELECT T2.size_code FROM Breeds AS T1 JOIN Dogs AS T2 ON T1.breed_code   =   T2.breed_code where T1.breed_name = "Bulldog"
turns.predict: SELECT T3.size_description FROM Breeds AS T1 JOIN Dogs AS T2 ON T1.breed_code = T2.breed_code JOIN Sizes AS T3 ON T2.size_code = T3.size_code WHERE T1.breed_name = 'Bulldog'

turns.text: What is the name of the breed with the most dogs?

turns.query: SELECT T1.breed_name FROM Breeds AS T1 JOIN Dogs AS T2 ON T1.breed_code   =   T2.breed_code GROUP BY T1.breed_name ORDER BY count ( * )  DESC LIMIT 1
turns.predict: SELECT T1.breed_name FROM Breeds AS T1 JOIN Dogs AS T2 ON T1.breed_code = T2.breed_code GROUP BY T1.breed_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

turns.text: Show the name of the teacher for the math course please?

turns.query: SELECT T3.Name FROM course_arrange AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.Course_ID   =   T2.Course_ID JOIN teacher AS T3 ON T1.Teacher_ID   =   T3.Teacher_ID WHERE T2.Course   =   "Math"
turns.predict: SELECT T1.Name FROM teacher AS T1 JOIN course_arrange AS T2 ON T1.Teacher_ID = T2.Teacher_ID JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.Course_ID = T3.Course_ID WHERE T3.Course = "Math"

turns.text: What grades do they teach? | The   grades  of courses that the teachers for the math teach are 1 and 3 | What dates do those courses start?

turns.query: SELECT T2.Staring_Date  FROM course_arrange AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.Course_ID   =   T2.Course_ID where T2.Course  =  "Math"
turns.predict: SELECT T3.Staring_Date FROM teacher AS T1 JOIN course_arrange AS T2 ON T1.Teacher_ID = T2.Teacher_ID JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.Course_ID = T3.Course_ID WHERE T1.Teacher_ID IN (SELECT T2.Teacher_ID FROM course_arrange AS T2 JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.Course_ID = T3.Course_ID WHERE T3.Course = "Math")

turns.text: LIST THE NATIONS WHICH DO NOT USE ENGLISH

turns.query: SELECT Name FROM country WHERE Name NOT IN  ( SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code   =   T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Language   =   "English" )
turns.predict: SELECT Name FROM country WHERE Code NOT IN (SELECT CountryCode FROM countrylanguage WHERE Language = 'English')

turns.text: WHAT IS THE POPULATION OF THE PEOPLE LIVING IN THE NATIONS NOT USING ENGLISH | did you mean you want the Population of the country  DO NOT USE ENGLISH | YES, THE TOTAL NUMBER OF PEOPLE LIVING IN THE NATIONS THAT DO NOT USE ENGLISH

turns.query: SELECT Name,sum ( Population )  FROM country WHERE Name NOT IN  ( SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code   =   T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Language   =   "English" )  group by Name
turns.predict: SELECT sum(Population) FROM country WHERE Code NOT IN (SELECT CountryCode FROM countrylanguage WHERE Language = 'English')

turns.text: What is the name of the visitor who visited both a museum opened before 2009 and a museum opened after 2011?

turns.query: SELECT t1.name FROM visitor AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.id   =   t2.visitor_id JOIN museum AS t3 ON t3.Museum_ID   =   t2.Museum_ID WHERE t3.open_year  <  2009 INTERSECT SELECT t1.name FROM visitor AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.id   =   t2.visitor_id JOIN museum AS t3 ON t3.Museum_ID   =   t2.Museum_ID WHERE t3.open_year  >  2011
turns.predict: SELECT Name FROM visitor WHERE ID IN (SELECT visitor_ID FROM visit JOIN museum ON visit.Museum_ID = museum.Museum_ID WHERE Open_Year  <  2009) AND ID IN (SELECT visitor_ID FROM visit JOIN museum ON visit.Museum_ID = museum.Museum_ID WHERE Open_Year  >  2011)

turns.text: What museum did he visit before 2009?

turns.query: SELECT t3.name FROM visitor AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.id   =   t2.visitor_id JOIN museum AS t3 ON t3.Museum_ID   =   t2.Museum_ID WHERE t3.open_year  <  2009 AND t1.name  =   ( SELECT t1.name FROM visitor AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.id   =   t2.visitor_id JOIN museum AS t3 ON t3.Museum_ID   =   t2.Museum_ID WHERE t3.open_year  <  2009 INTERSECT SELECT t1.name FROM visitor AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.id   =   t2.visitor_id JOIN museum AS t3 ON t3.Museum_ID   =   t2.Museum_ID WHERE t3.open_year  >  2011 )
turns.predict: SELECT T2.Name FROM visit AS T1 JOIN museum AS T2 ON T1.Museum_ID = T2.Museum_ID WHERE T2.Open_Year  <  2009 AND T1.visitor_ID IN (SELECT visitor_ID FROM visit JOIN museum ON visit.Museum_ID = museum.Museum_ID WHERE Open_Year  <  2009) AND T1.visitor_ID IN (SELECT visitor_ID FROM visit JOIN museum ON visit.Museum_ID = museum.Museum_ID WHERE Open_Year  >  2011)
